query:
-- 查看所有客戶（含測試關鍵字）
SELECT id, name, contactName, status, createdAt 
FROM clients 
WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%test%' 
   OR name LIKE '%批次%' OR name LIKE '%demo%' OR name LIKE '%Demo%'
   OR contactName LIKE '%測試%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
